title: Maniac Cop 2
review: Somehow, the maniac cop has returned. This one has more action and stunts; in fact it cold opens with a screeching police car before you even see any production logos, although this is a highlight reel of the stunts at the end of the first film showing how the manic cop died (again). You are reminded of how he was stabbed through the chest with a boat's mast. It continues with a higher budget for this kind of thing, with more destroyed vehicles and fire, surprisingly bringing back key characters from the first film only to unceremoniously kill them off. I think I liked it slightly more, on account of it being sillier and more entertaining, if not a better plot. It's a {Friday the 13th} style slasher with less suspense and more action. The best part was the reveal of {Maniac Cop Rap}, the theme song during the end credits. Whatever happened to television presenters smoking a pipe on camera in the studio? How come you never see that these days?
